name: honesty-crypto-verification
_note: Factory self-honesty loop (audit -> correct), forked from code-review-fix. Triggered by /honesty on a PR comment (run keyed pr-<N>). The triage agent (honesty-triage-agent) audits whether the factory's prior fix loop honestly resolved the [ai-review] issues it CLOSED on this PR, comparing each closed issue's suggested fix against the committed diff, and surfaces the single clearest dishonest closure as one cluster. The fix agent (honesty-fix-agent) proposes the genuine correction; conclude-fix commits it to the PR head and resolves the matching issue by title. A crypto-verify phase (honesty-crypto-verification-agent) then runs after fix: per fix it reads any `test_output`, computes a real sha256 of it (via the sha256sum binary) and appends it as `crypto-verification-hash` (null when there is no/empty test_output); the deterministic crypto-hash-valid check re-verifies every hash with hashlib (gating a fabricated hash), and conclude-crypto-verify posts one green/red PR comment marking each fix verified or 'not tested / not honest'. Reuses code-review-fix's schemas/checks/conclude-* verbatim; new files are the two renamed agents plus the crypto-verify agent/schema/check/hook. code-review-fix is untouched.

states.label: propose remediation + commit to the PR
